fields.label: Dimension Fieldname
fields.description: Fieldname on the source DocType (e.g. item_group). Must be a Link field.

fields.label: Label
fields.description: Human-readable label, auto-populated from the source DocType's field meta.

fields.label: Link DocType
fields.description: Target DocType of the link field, auto-populated when the parent is saved.

fields.label: Mandatory Filter in Report
fields.description: If checked, the Custom Ledger Report will require a filter on this dimension.
